en: The LORD visited Sarah as he had said, and the LORD did to Sarah as he had promised.
zh: 耶和華照著以前所說的，眷顧撒拉；耶和華按著他的應許，給撒拉作成。

en: And Sarah conceived and bore Abraham a son in his old age at the time of which God had spoken to him.
zh: 亞伯拉罕年老的時候，撒拉懷了孕，到了 神應許的日期，就給亞伯拉罕生了一個兒子。

en: Abraham called the name of his son who was born to him, whom Sarah bore him, Isaac.
zh: 亞伯拉罕給撒拉為他所生的兒子，起名叫以撒。

en: And Abraham circumcised his son Isaac when he was eight days old, as God had commanded him.
zh: 亞伯拉罕的兒子以撒生下來第八天，亞伯拉罕就照著 神吩咐他的，給以撒行了割禮。

en: Abraham was a hundred years old when his son Isaac was born to him.
zh: 他兒子以撒出生的時候，亞伯拉罕正一百歲。

en: And Sarah said, "God has made laughter for me; everyone who hears will laugh over me."
zh: 撒拉說：“ 神使我歡笑，凡聽見的，也必為我歡笑。”

en: And she said, "Who would have said to Abraham that Sarah would nurse children? Yet I have borne him a son in his old age."
zh: 又說：“誰能告訴亞伯拉罕，撒拉要乳養兒女呢？在他年老的時候，我竟給他生了一個兒子。”

en: And the child grew and was weaned. And Abraham made a great feast on the day that Isaac was weaned.
zh: 孩子漸漸長大，就斷了奶。以撒斷奶的那天，亞伯拉罕擺設盛大的筵席。

en: But Sarah saw the son of Hagar the Egyptian, whom she had borne to Abraham, laughing.
zh: 撒拉看見那埃及人夏甲給亞伯拉罕所生的兒子在嬉戲，

en: So she said to Abraham, "Cast out this slave woman with her son, for the son of this slave woman shall not be heir with my son Isaac."
zh: 就對亞伯拉罕說：“把這婢女和她的兒子趕出去，因為這婢女的兒子不能和我的兒子以撒一同承受產業。”

en: And the thing was very displeasing to Abraham on account of his son.
zh: 亞伯拉罕因他的兒子而非常煩惱。

en: But God said to Abraham, "Be not displeased because of the boy and because of your slave woman. Whatever Sarah says to you, do as she tells you, for through Isaac shall your offspring be named.
zh: 神對亞伯拉罕說：“不要因這童子和你的婢女而煩惱。撒拉對你說的話，你都要聽從；因為以撒生的，才可以稱為你的後裔。

en: And I will make a nation of the son of the slave woman also, because he is your offspring."
zh: 至於這婢女的兒子，我也要使他成為一國，因為他是你的後裔。”

en: So Abraham rose early in the morning and took bread and a skin of water and gave it to Hagar, putting it on her shoulder, along with the child, and sent her away. And she departed and wandered in the wilderness of Beersheba.
zh: 亞伯拉罕清早起來，拿餅和一皮袋水，給了夏甲，放在她的肩膀上，又把孩子交給她，就打發她離開。夏甲走了，在別是巴的曠野飄蕩。

en: When the water in the skin was gone, she put the child under one of the bushes.
zh: 皮袋裡的水用盡了，夏甲就把孩子撇在一棵小樹底下。

en: Then she went and sat down opposite him a good way off, about the distance of a bowshot, for she said, "Let me not look on the death of the child." And as she sat opposite him, she lifted up her voice and wept.
zh: 然後自己走開，在離開約有一箭之遠的地方，相對而坐，說：“我不忍眼看孩子死去。”就相對坐著，放聲大哭。

en: And God heard the voice of the boy, and the angel of God called to Hagar from heaven and said to her, "What troubles you, Hagar? Fear not, for God has heard the voice of the boy where he is.
zh: 神聽見了童子的聲音，他的使者就從天上呼叫夏甲，對她說：“夏甲啊，你為甚麼這樣呢？不要害怕，因為孩子在那裡所發的聲音 神已經聽見了。

en: Up! Lift up the boy, and hold him fast with your hand, for I will make him into a great nation."
zh: 起來，扶起孩子，盡力保護他；因為我要使他成為大國。”

en: Then God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water. And she went and filled the skin with water and gave the boy a drink.
zh: 神開了夏甲的眼睛，她就看見一口水井。她去把皮袋盛滿了水，就給孩子喝。

en: And God was with the boy, and he grew up. He lived in the wilderness and became an expert with the bow.
zh: 神與孩子同在，他漸漸長大，住在曠野，成了個弓箭手。

en: He lived in the wilderness of Paran, and his mother took a wife for him from the land of Egypt.
zh: 他住在巴蘭的曠野，他的母親從埃及地給他娶了一個妻子。

en: At that time Abimelech and Phicol the commander of his army said to Abraham, "God is with you in all that you do.
zh: 那時，亞比米勒和他的軍長非各對亞伯拉罕說：“在你所作的一切事上， 神都與你同在。

en: Now therefore swear to me here by God that you will not deal falsely with me or with my descendants or with my posterity, but as I have dealt kindly with you, so you will deal with me and with the land where you have sojourned."
zh: 現在你要在這裡指著 神對我起誓，你不會以詭詐待我和我的子子孫孫。我怎樣恩待了你，你也要怎樣恩待我和你寄居的地方。”

en: And Abraham said, "I will swear."
zh: 亞伯拉罕回答：“我願意起誓。”

en: When Abraham reproved Abimelech about a well of water that Abimelech's servants had seized,
zh: 亞伯拉罕因亞比米勒的僕人強佔了一口水井，就指責亞比米勒。

en: Abimelech said, "I do not know who has done this thing; you did not tell me, and I have not heard of it until today."
zh: 亞比米勒說：“誰作了這事，我不知道，你也沒有告訴我；我現在才聽見。”

en: So Abraham took sheep and oxen and gave them to Abimelech, and the two men made a covenant.
zh: 於是亞伯拉罕牽了牛羊來，送給亞比米勒，二人就彼此立約。

en: Abraham set seven ewe lambs of the flock apart.
zh: 亞伯拉罕把羊群中的七隻母羊羔，放在另外一處。

en: And Abimelech said to Abraham, "What is the meaning of these seven ewe lambs that you have set apart?"
zh: 亞比米勒問亞伯拉罕：“你把這七隻母羊羔放在另外一處，是甚麼意思呢？”

en: He said, "These seven ewe lambs you will take from my hand, that this may be a witness for me that I dug this well."
zh: 亞伯拉罕回答：“意思就是：你從我手裡接受這七隻母羊羔，好作我挖了這口井的證據。”

en: Therefore that place was called Beersheba, because there both of them swore an oath.
zh: 因此那地方名叫別是巴，因為他們二人在那裡起了誓。

en: So they made a covenant at Beersheba. Then Abimelech and Phicol the commander of his army rose up and returned to the land of the Philistines.
zh: 他們在別是巴立約以後，亞比米勒和他的軍長非各，就起程回非利士地去了。

en: Abraham planted a tamarisk tree in Beersheba and called there on the name of the LORD, the Everlasting God.
zh: 亞伯拉罕在別是巴栽了一棵垂絲柳樹，就在那裡求告耶和華永活的 神的名。

en: And Abraham sojourned many days in the land of the Philistines.
zh: 亞伯拉罕在非利士人的地方寄居了許多日子。
